bird.name: Olrog's cinclodes
bird.summary: Olrog's cinclodes (Cinclodes olrogi) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is endemic to…

locations.name: 科尔多瓦省 (阿根廷)
locations.summary: 科尔多瓦省（西班牙語：Córdoba）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷中部，首府為科尔多瓦（Córdoba）。 參考文獻

locations.name: 圣路易斯省
locations.summary: 圣路易斯省（San Luis）為南美國家阿根廷二十三省之一，位於阿根廷中部，首府為圣路易斯（San Luis）。

relations.subject: Olrog's cinclodes
relations.evidence: It occurs in the Sierras Grandes and Sierras de Comechingones of Córdoba Province and the Sierras de San Luis in adjoining San Luis Province

relations.subject: Olrog's cinclodes
relations.evidence: It occurs in the Sierras Grandes and Sierras de Comechingones of Córdoba Province and the Sierras de San Luis in adjoining San Luis Province

relations.subject: Olrog's cinclodes
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered common within that small range, where it is "relatively free from human disturbance; grazing appears to be the only potential problem"
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
